patch:
--- a/mux_controller.v
+++ b/mux_controller.v
@@ -10,7 +10,7 @@ module mux_controller (
   mux_4to1 mux_inst (
     .in0(data0),
     .in1(data1),
-    .in2(data2),
+    .in2(data2),
     .in3(data3),
     .sel(select),
     .out(mux_output)
@@ -10,7 +10,7 @@ module mux_controller (
   mux_4to1 mux_inst (
     .in0(data0),
     .in1(data1),
-    .in2(data2),
+    .in2(data2[7:0]),
     .in3(data3),
     .sel(select),
     .out(mux_output)
before_code:
module mux_4to1 (
  input [7:0] in0,
  input [7:0] in1,
  input [7:0] in2,
  input [7:0] in3,
  input [1:0] sel,
  output [7:0] out
);
  assign out = (sel == 2'b00) ? in0 :
               (sel == 2'b01) ? in1 :
               (sel == 2'b10) ? in2 : in3;
endmodule

module mux_controller (
  input [7:0] data0,
  input [7:0] data1,
  input [15:0] data2,
  input [7:0] data3,
  input [1:0] select,
  output [7:0] mux_output
);
  mux_4to1 mux_inst (
    .in0(data0),
    .in1(data1),
    .in2(data2),
    .in3(data3),
    .sel(select),
    .out(mux_output)
  );
endmodule
after_code:
module mux_4to1 (
  input [7:0] in0,
  input [7:0] in1,
  input [7:0] in2,
  input [7:0] in3,
  input [1:0] sel,
  output [7:0] out
);
  assign out = (sel == 2'b00) ? in0 :
               (sel == 2'b01) ? in1 :
               (sel == 2'b10) ? in2 : in3;
endmodule

module mux_controller (
  input [7:0] data0,
  input [7:0] data1,
  input [15:0] data2,
  input [7:0] data3,
  input [1:0] select,
  output [7:0] mux_output
);
  mux_4to1 mux_inst (
    .in0(data0),
    .in1(data1),
    .in2(data2[7:0]),
    .in3(data3),
    .sel(select),
    .out(mux_output)
  );
endmodule
